name: cgel
description: Contract-Gated Evidence Loop — sealed task contracts with scope-gated edits, approvals by one AskUserQuestion tap (seal, unblock, overrides, git push) instead of typed commands, several tasks open in parallel per repo, a frozen governance bundle, a native long-horizon roadmap (ideas, milestones, verification recipes) writable any time without blocking a seal, hash-chained verification evidence with watch-scoped staleness, budgeted iterations with a default-same failure guard, built-in review rules judged by an opus verifier (impacted code, introduced defects, root-cause fixes, and secrets block; debt, test coverage, comments, and prose that leads with the action and a reader can forward advise), a design challenger that questions weak plans before sealing, a cleanup sweep before close, an evidence-gated PASS with sanitized attestations, and commits/PRs authored solely by you — never AI-attributed.
